title: Gorilla Super Glue Tape, 6.1m x 15.88mm – Heavy Duty, Crystal Clear, No Mess Double Sided Tape, Ideal for Permanent Repairs, Quick Fixes & Craft | Bonds Glass, Fabric, Paper, Cardboard & More
features: CRYSTAL CLEAR: Gorilla Super Glue Tape provides a Crystal-clear finish. Its transparent appearance ensures seamless and invisible bonding for a professional-looking finish on a variety of surfaces.
NO MESS ALTERNATIVE TO SUPER GLUE: Gorilla Super Glue Tape provides a clean and hassle-free alternative to traditional super glue, offering easy handling without drips or spills.

INDOOR & OUTDOOR: Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, delivering permanent adhesion on a diverse range of materials including glass, fabric, paper, cardboard, and more, ensuring versatile and long-lasting bonding solutions for various projects.
PERMANENT ADHESION: Our tearable Super Glue Tape offers durable adhesion that withstands the test of time, making it suitable for a wide range of permanent repairs, quick fixes, and craft projects.

HOW TO USE: Surfaces must be flat, clean, dry, and free of dirt and oil. Cut tape to desired length and position and press tape against one surface and rub firmly. Do not use to mount objects as this is a permanent tape and may damage surface if removed.

Application Cut tape to desired length and position and press tape against one surface and rub firmly. Remove liner and adhere second object by pressing firmly. Do not use to mount objects. This is a permanent tape and may damage surface if removed Apply tape to back of object vertically. Use 10.2cm of tape per 454g. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object. For further instructions, see back of pack Surfaces must be flat, clean and dry. Apply tape to back of object vertically. Use 10.2cm of tape per 454g. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object. For further instructions, see back of pack. Apply to clean, even surfaces at room temperature. Both surfaces should make complete contact. Cut tape to desired size and place on desired area, rubbing against surface. Align object to tape and press firmly. Surfaces must be flat, clean and dry. Apply tape to back of object vertically Use 23cm of tape per 1kg of weight. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object. For further instructions, see back of pack. Surfaces must be flat, clean and dry. Apply tape to back of object vertically. Use 5cm of tape per 454g of weight. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object.
